LanguageData.UB_SNS_OhGodAXavierRenegadeAngelReferenc: [PAWN_nameDef] wandered the rimworld asking unanswerable questions and causing deeply answerable problems. [PAWN_pronoun] sought a father’s hug, a sense of self, and the ancient wisdom of "What doth life?". Wherever they went, confusion followed. And usually a horde of manhunting squirrels...
